name: Noel
description:
|| Step-siblings ||

Femboy stepbro adventures continue. In a form of a prequel,maybe? Yea,lets go with that...

His life takes a nasty turn when he's booted out unceremoniously from his home,forcing him to turn to his last resort - knocking on step-brother's door,a man who symbolizes everything he wishes he could be.
creator: Badlee
